figures.caption: Fig. 1: Overview of ADAPTIVE ERGODIC IMITATION. A nominal trajectory induces tracking behavior when execution remains aligned with the demonstration. Under mismatch, the target particle distribution expands and the ergodic planner promotes exploration around the reference. Once the obstacle is bypassed, the score-based kernel contracts the distribution and pulls the agent back toward the demonstrated trajectory.
Fig. 3: Quantitative maze results under gate-location perturbations sampled around the nominal layout.
Fig. 2: Adaptive exploration in the maze environment.
